prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约8278名、7851名、9197名、9850名、11195名，整体呈波动后移趋势，尤其近三年从9198名持续后移至11195名， 累计后移约2000名，2025年基准位次约11195名；该校在北京市招生计划2021–2024年均为24人，2025年增至27人，2026年进一步扩至29人，连续两年扩招 ，扩招幅度约7.4%，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 暨南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在50–60名区间（2026年约第59名），属中上水 平综合类大学；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及宿舍楼安装安检设备等校园管理事件，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第41位，评价为"较热"，短视 频曝光量中等偏上，反映报考关注度尚可；第五轮学科评估中，新闻传播学获评A、工商管理获评A、应用经济学获评A-、中国语言文学获评A-、生物学获评A-、 药学获评A-，人文社科与生命科学实力均衡。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关专业大类中，电子信息/通信为高热推荐，计算机类为推荐，会计/财务/审计为推荐；但新闻传播学处 于明显劝退状态，工商管理/商科管理为明显劝退，金融/财经/经济为分化观望，热门工科与冷门文科形成分化。本省2026年普通高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长 约29.7%，竞争显著加剧；暨南大学位于广东省广州市，属京外招生，在京招生计划占比较小（约29人），地域偏好对北 京考生影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11195名、2026年扩招至29人（缓解竞争约7.4%）、本省考生大幅增加约29.7%（加剧竞争）、声誉中性、优势学科热度分 化等因素，竞争加剧效应略强于扩招缓解效应，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约11723名，区间11223–12223名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 会计学（数智会计创新班）
- 经济学（拔尖创新班）
- 税收学
- 法学（涉外法治特色班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 行政管理
- 国际新闻与传播（全英语教学）
- 广告学
- 汉语国际教育
- 金融工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子科学与技术
- 数学与应用数学
- 生物科学
- 临床医学（校本部班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约11723名，区间11223–12223名。位次在此区间内建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业适度冲刺、三档专业稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间上限（如11000名以内）可重点冲 击一档的会计学、经济学等王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（如12000名以后）应以三档的电子科学与技术、数学与应用数学等工科基础专业为主，兼顾二档的汉语国际教育等文科 专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 8278, 7851, 9197, 9850, and 11195 respectively, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend, especially in the last three years where it moved from 9198 to 11195, a cumulative decline of about 2000 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11195. The university's enrollment plan in Beijing was 24 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 27 in 2025, and further expanded to 29 in 2026, with two consecutive years of expansion, an increase of about 7.4%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been stable in the 50-60 range in recent years (approximately 59th in 2026), placing it as a mid-to-upper level comprehensive university. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as the installation of security equipment in dormitory buildings, with no obvious negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 41st, rated as 'relatively hot', with medium-to-high short video exposure, reflecting a moderate level of application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Journalism and Communication received an A, Business Administration received an A, Applied Economics received an A-, Chinese Language and Literature received an A-, Biology received an A-, and Pharmacy received an A-, showing a balanced strength in humanities, social sciences, and life sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among related major categories, Electronic Information/Communication is a high-recommendation hot major, Computer Science is recommended, and Accounting/Finance/Auditing is recommended. However, Journalism and Communication is in a clear state of discouragement, Business Administration/Business Management is clearly discouraged, and Finance/Finance/Economics is in a state of divergence and wait-and-see, forming a differentiation between popular engineering and unpopular liberal arts. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in this province is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, and is an out-of-Beijing enrollment, with a relatively small enrollment plan in Beijing (about 29 students), so regional preference has limited impact on Beijing candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11195, the 2026 expansion to 29 students (alleviating competition by about 7.4%), the significant increase in provincial candidates by about 29.7% (intensifying competition), neutral reputation, and differentiation in the popularity of advantageous disciplines, the intensifying effect of competition is slightly stronger than the alleviating effect of expansion. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11723, with a range of 11223 to 12223.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Accounting (Digital Intelligence Accounting Innovation Class)
- Economics (Top Innovation Class)
- Taxation
- Law (International Rule of Law Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Administrative Management
- International Journalism and Communication (Full English Instruction)
- Advertising
- Chinese International Education
- Financial Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Electronic Science and Technology
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
- Biological Sciences
- Clinical Medicine (Main Campus Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 11723, range 11223–12223. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, moderately aim for Tier 1 majors, and safely fall back on Tier 3 majors. Candidates with rankings significantly above the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 11000) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Accounting and Economics. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit of the range (e.g., after 12000) should primarily consider Tier 3 engineering foundation majors such as Electronic Science and Technology and Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, while also considering Tier 2 liberal arts majors such as Chinese International Education.
